Localization.Description: Attempt to create a database backup or a cluster service from a backup

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} started creating the database of the {event_src.subsys} service from a backup on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start creating the database of the {event_src.subsys} service from a backup on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
A database of the {event_src.subsys} service is created from a backup on host {event_src.host}
A database backup of the {event_src.subsys} service is created on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start a backup of the {event_src.subsys} service database on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} started a backup of the {event_src.subsys} service database on host {event_src.host}
